svg.title: LithePG create_release_zip startup environment fail-closed verification
svg.desc: Evidence for the 2026-06-02 hardening slice: RED test failed on the old helper, focused shell tests passed, Swift tests passed, and dogfood check passed.
svg.text: LithePG evidence — create_release_zip startup env fail-closed
Timestamp: 2026-06-02 05:13 EDT • Branch: main • Base HEAD before commit: b1c56c4
RED
Temp HEAD helper + new test failed as expected:
test_create_release_zip failed: create release zip sanitizer marker with dirty startup env should exit 2, got 0
GREEN
bash script/test_create_release_zip.sh → test_create_release_zip passed
Adjacent shell gates: test_package_verify, test_sign_and_notarize, test_v10_release_gate → passed
bash -n script/create_release_zip.sh script/test_create_release_zip.sh → passed
git diff --check → passed
SWIFT + DOGFOOD
swift build → passed
swift test → 127 Swift Testing tests across 20 suites passed; gated integration tests skipped as designed
dogfood_check.sh → passed; artifacts: .build/dogfood-checks/20260602-051314/
Metrics: shell 130.19 ms • connected 261.21 ms • raw 21.379 MiB • strip 11.980 MiB
Query overhead: SELECT 1 median 0.047 ms • dogfood median 0.025 ms
CHANGE
script/create_release_zip.sh now exits 2 with a generic redacted message if dirty startup env remains after sanitizer marker.
No signing, notarization, upload, Homebrew publication, GitHub Release, tag, cron changes, or external publication attempted.
Result: verified hardening slice ready for commit.
